QUESTIONS:

<Q: Why are there no longer co-workers/friends?
<A: https://janitorai.com/characters/23d3e886-7c73-44f4-86f9-e334cf898715_character-important-changes-in-character-creation

<Q: Will you ever do more ZZZ Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Most definitely yes, I do plan on creating more ZZZ characters in the near-future. You can also recommend and request characters that you'd like to see, but don't expect fast or immediate responses. Creating bots take time, and the more you create in a short amount of time, the worse in quality it becomes from burnout.

<Q: Why does the bot keep speaking for me, or know my name?

<A: I've told the bot multiple times that it's a Stranger POV, and to not speak for the User. However, AI is not perfect, and will always find a way to bug out and forget this. In short, this is not an issue with the bot, it's an issue with the LLM. A good trick I found is to manually delete or edit the messages. The AI writes based on their past messages, so if you let them speak for you once, they'll continue to do so.
